scripts.lint:security: eslint server/index.js server/security.js server/api.js server/logger.js server/auth.js server/email.js server/authorization.js server/jobs.js server/matches.js server/messaging.js server/projects.js server/reviews-safety.js server/migrations.js scripts/migrate.js scripts/create-pilot-invite.js scripts/live-smoke-jobs.js scripts/live-smoke-match.js scripts/live-smoke-messaging.js scripts/live-smoke-projects.js scripts/live-smoke-reviews-safety.js scripts/live-smoke-shop-talk-reactions.js scripts/live-gate-a-hardening.js scripts/live-ui-accessibility.js scripts/live-ui-daily-log-records.js scripts/production-synthetic-monitor.js scripts/incident-readiness-check.js scripts/launch-readiness-check.js scripts/logical-backup-utils.js scripts/create-logical-backup-artifact.js scripts/restore-logical-backup-artifact.js scripts/restore-logical-copy.js scripts/restore-drill.js scripts/cleanup-gate-a-demo-artifacts.js test/security.test.js test/api.test.js test/auth.test.js test/authorization.test.js test/jobs.test.js test/incident-readiness.test.js test/launch-readiness.test.js test/logical-backup-utils.test.js test/server.integration.test.js test/server.database.integration.test.js test/auth-lifecycle.integration.test.js test/jobs.integration.test.js test/match-acceptance.integration.test.js test/messaging-notifications.integration.test.js test/project-completion.integration.test.js test/reviews-admin-safety.integration.test.js test/shop-talk-reactions.integration.test.js test/migrations.integration.test.js test/auth-fail-closed.e2e.mjs test/jobs-discovery.e2e.mjs

scripts.test:unit: node --test test/security.test.js test/api.test.js test/auth.test.js test/authorization.test.js test/jobs.test.js test/incident-readiness.test.js test/launch-readiness.test.js test/logical-backup-utils.test.js
scripts.test:integration: node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/server.integration.test.js test/server.database.integration.test.js test/auth-lifecycle.integration.test.js test/jobs.integration.test.js test/match-acceptance.integration.test.js test/messaging-notifications.integration.test.js test/project-completion.integration.test.js test/reviews-admin-safety.integration.test.js test/shop-talk-reactions.integration.test.js test/migrations.integration.test.js
